description: Agent acts autonomously: proposes a plan and executes immediately without requesting permission for standard operations.

rules.autonomous_action: User says WHAT they want. Agent decides HOW to do it and acts immediately.
when_to_ask_user: ambiguous intent where context is unclear

trap_patterns.fix: Execute immediately after proposing. Report results, not approval.

trap_patterns.trap: Complex query → read WM/log/AGENTS.md → propose plan → stop
New topic → unsure → offer discussion → stop
trap_patterns.fix: Ask ONE clarifying question, then execute regardless. No loops on uncertainty.
